mapper.sql: SELECT l.*, e.name AS applicant_name, e.employee_no AS applicant_no FROM oa_leave l LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON l.applicant_id = e.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_leave (applicant_id, type, start_time, end_time, reason, status) VALUES (#{applicantId}, #{type}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE oa_leave SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_leave_audit (leave_id, auditor_id, action, comment, audit_time) VALUES (#{leaveId}, #{auditorId}, #{action}, #{comment}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, e.name AS auditor_name FROM oa_leave_audit a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.auditor_id = e.id WHERE a.leave_id = #{leaveId} ORDER BY a.audit_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_leave_attachment (leave_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, mime_type) VALUES (#{leaveId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_leave_attachment WHERE leave_id = #{leaveId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
